onboarding.language_subtitle: Select the language for your pilgrimage guide
onboarding.origin_subtitle: Helps us personalise your pilgrimage guide
onboarding.identity_subtitle: This information is required for your safety
onboarding.miqat_subtitle: Your Miqat is the boundary where you enter Ihram. Confirm below or select manually.
onboarding.miqat_permission_reason: Mutawwif needs your location to detect your Miqat boundary and guide your pilgrimage.
onboarding.origin_miqat_autodetect: Miqat will be determined from your GPS location during travel.
onboarding.identity_nusuk_hint: Optional — adds your ID to SOS messages for faster emergency response.
onboarding.identity_hotel_hint: Shown on your identity card — helps taxi drivers and security.
onboarding.miqat_explanation: A Miqat is the geographical boundary that every pilgrim must not cross without Ihram. The app will alert you as you approach your Miqat.
onboarding.miqat_location_denied: Location denied. You can continue but Miqat won't auto-detect.
onboarding.ritual_umrah_subtitle: A visit to Makkah — any time of year
onboarding.ritual_tamattu_hint: Umrah first, then Hajj — recommended for pilgrims outside Saudi Arabia
onboarding.ritual_qiran_hint: Umrah and Hajj in one Ihram — combined intention
onboarding.ritual_ifrad_hint: Hajj only — mainly for Saudi residents
onboarding.ritual_unsure: Not sure? Tamattu’ is the right choice for most pilgrims
onboarding.validation_nusuk_invalid: Nusuk ID format: letters, numbers and dashes only

tracker.zone_alert: You appear to be outside the correct zone.
tracker.gps_warning: Weak GPS signal — manual mode active
tracker.sos_confirm_message: This will send your location to your emergency contact via SMS.

heat.danger_body: Temperature is {{temp}}°C. Drink 500ml water now. You may sit and rest.
heat.extreme_body: Temperature is {{temp}}°C. Find shade and drink water. Seek medical help if feeling unwell.

recovery.title: Welcome Back
recovery.subtitle: You were in the middle of a ritual

damm.title: Important: Miqat Crossed Without Ihram
damm.body: It appears you crossed the Miqat boundary without being in a state of Ihram. This requires a ruling (Damm — expiation sacrifice) according to Islamic jurisprudence.

wallet.title: Identity Vault
wallet.show_to_driver: Show this screen to any taxi driver or security officer
wallet.show_to_driver_ar: أرني هذه الشاشة لأي سائق أو ضابط أمن

ask.placeholder: Ask your question about Hajj or Umrah...
ask.disclaimer: AI guidance only — not a fatwa. Consult a scholar for binding rulings.
ask.source_partial: Partial match — ask AI for more detail
ask.damm_locked_body: Your account requires a scholar consultation before receiving ritual guidance. Please resolve your Miqat situation first.
ask.setup_required_body: Complete your profile to get personalised guidance on Hajj and Umrah rulings.
ask.profile_tip: Add your profile for personalised answers — tap to set up
ask.suggestion_shave: Does a woman need to shave?
ask.empty_subtitle: Ask any question about Hajj or Umrah
ask.no_azkar: No Athkar in this category yet.

miqat.ihram_worn_on_plane: I wore Ihram on the plane

guide.steps_count: {{count}} steps — detailed guidance with du'a & rulings
guide.tap_hint: Tap a step to mark it active
guide.hajj_season_msg: Hajj guide activates during Hajj months (Shawwal – Dhul Hijja)

tracker_ui.pick_subtitle: Choose a ritual to start counting
